title: ochrosia grandiflora
intro: Ochrosia grandiflora, also known as the Night-blooming Yew or Golden Rain Tree, is a flowering evergreen tree native to Southeast Asia. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly for treating fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions due to its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Ochrosia grandiflora include reducing inflammation, relieving pain, and promoting wound healing. In traditional herbal preparations, the leaves and bark of the tree are used to make decoctions, infusions, and tinctures, which are used to treat various health conditions.
